jobs.title: Sustainability-Inspired Bottle Illustration Design
jobs.description:
Title:
Bottle Illustration Design for Sustainability Brand (UV Raised Printing, Qatar-Inspired)

Project Overview

I am looking for an experienced illustrator / graphic designer to create a detailed engraved-style illustration for a reusable stainless steel bottle. We're wanting to grow the refill culture in Qatar

The bottle belongs to EcoLuxia Sustainability Solutions, a sustainability company based in Qatar.

The design will be used on bottles presented at national events, so it should feel refined, culturally grounded, and sustainability-driven.

The aesthetic should resemble premium engraved bottle artwork, while remaining clean, balanced, and modern.

Bottle Specifications

Bottle color: Matte olive / dark green

Artwork color: Silver

Bottle dimensions:

Height: 18.5 cm

jobs.title: Wie-Wie's Cosmic Wave
jobs.description:
I’m launching a small online shop dedicated to selling custom logos (delivered as instant digital downloads). I need a clean, professional website that makes it effortless for visitors to browse, purchase, and receive their logo files.  

Core requirements  
• Design & build a modern storefront that looks great on desktop and is fully responsive on phones and tablets.  
• Straight-forward navigation with clear calls-to-action so customers can get from landing page to checkout in as few clicks as possible.  
• Secure payment processing and automated delivery of the digital files once payment clears.  
• Basic on-page SEO: keyword-optimised titles, meta descriptions, and alt text so the site can start ranking for logo-related searches.  
• Integration of my...

jobs.title: Native English Account Manager Mexico
jobs.description:
I need an entry-level account manager, based in Mexico, who speaks native-level English and feels at home in the marketing industry. Your central focus will be client relationship management: keeping day-to-day communication smooth, gathering feedback, flagging issues early, and making sure each client feels heard and valued.   

You will sit between our internal creative and media teams and the customer, translating campaign progress into clear updates while relaying client goals back to us in actionable terms. Expect to spend most of your time on email, video calls and the occasional on-site visit within Mexico, so reliable internet and a professional online presence are essential. Experience with common marketing tools such as HubSpot, Mailchimp or similar CRMs will help you get up to s...

jobs.title: Luxury Card Deck Box Artwork Refinement
jobs.description:
Project Title

Luxury Packaging Designer Needed – Prepare Card Deck Box Artwork for Print (Using Manufacturer Dieline)

Project Description

I am looking for an experienced packaging designer / print production artist to finalize artwork for a premium affirmation card deck box.

I already have the core design completed, including the typography, illustrations, and general layout direction. What I need is a professional who can map the design onto the manufacturer’s dieline template, refine the layout, and prepare high-quality print-ready production files.

This is primarily a refinement and production setup project, however if you see opportunities to improve the layout or elevate the design while keeping the same direction, I would welcome those improvements.

The goal is for ...

jobs.title: Action/Adventure PC Game Development
jobs.description:
I'm seeking an experienced game developer to create an engaging first-person action/adventure PC game. The ideal candidate should have:

- Proficiency in game development engines like Unity or Unreal Engine.
- Strong skills in 3D modeling, animation, and game physics.
- Experience in designing immersive storylines and dynamic gameplay mechanics.
- Ability to collaborate on sound design and integrate AI for NPC behavior.

Please provide a portfolio showcasing similar projects.
